Class GameSystem

java.lang.Object
logic.world.GameSystem
public class GameSystem extends Object
Singleton that owns all mutable game state for the current play session.

Holds references to the active Map, the Student, and the four synchronized entity lists (teachers, bullets, questions, spells). loadLevel(int) resets these lists and initialises a new level. spawnTeacher() and spawnBullet() are called periodically by the spawn loop in GamePane.

    loadLevel(int level)
    Clears all entity lists, loads the map and questions for the given level, starts the level background music, and spawns the student at (1,1).
    void
    setGameActive(boolean active)
    Sets the game-active flag; pass false to signal the game loop to stop.
    void

    Records the character chosen by the player before the game starts.
    void
    spawnBullet()
    Spawns a BulletItem at a random item tile and adds its sprite to the game board.
    void
    spawnTeacher()
    Spawns a random teacher at a spawner tile if fewer than 5 teachers are currently active.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static GameSystem getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance, creating it on first call.
      Returns:
      the shared GameSystem instance

    • loadLevel

      public void loadLevel(int level)
      Clears all entity lists, loads the map and questions for the given level, starts the level background music, and spawns the student at (1,1).
      Parameters:
      level - level number (1-based); used to locate maps/N.txt and questions/N.txt

    • spawnTeacher

      public void spawnTeacher()
      Spawns a random teacher at a spawner tile if fewer than 5 teachers are currently active. Adds the teacher's sprite to the game board via GamePane.

    • spawnBullet

      public void spawnBullet()
      Spawns a BulletItem at a random item tile and adds its sprite to the game board.

    • getCurrentMap

      public Map getCurrentMap()
      Returns:
      the currently loaded level map

    • getTeachers

      public List<BaseTeacher> getTeachers()
      Returns:
      synchronized list of active teachers

    • getQuestions

      public List<QuestionMark> getQuestions()
      Returns:
      synchronized list of active quest terminals

    • getBullets

      public List<BulletItem> getBullets()
      Returns:
      synchronized list of active bullet items on the map

    • getCurrentLevel

      public int getCurrentLevel()
      Returns:
      current level number (1-based)

    • getStudent

      public Student getStudent()
      Returns:
      the player-controlled Student for the current level

    • getSpells

      public List<SpellShot> getSpells()
      Returns:
      synchronized list of in-flight SpellShots

    • isGameActive

      public boolean isGameActive()
      Returns:
      true while the game loop should keep running

    • setGameActive

      public void setGameActive(boolean active)
      Sets the game-active flag; pass false to signal the game loop to stop.
      Parameters:
      active - false to end the current game session

    • getSelectedCharacter

      public CharacterProfile getSelectedCharacter()
      Returns:
      the character profile selected by the player, or null if none chosen

    • setSelectedCharacter

      public void setSelectedCharacter(CharacterProfile profile)
      Records the character chosen by the player before the game starts.
      Parameters:
      profile - the selected CharacterProfile
